content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:AthenaPortillo.png|thumb|200px|[[Athena Yvette Portillo]] was born in May 1972]]

A list of events in '''1972''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 28|28]] – [[Rachel Butera]] is born.
*[[January 29|29]] – [[Brian Wood]] is born.

==February==
*[[February 8|08]] – [[Brendan Wayne]] is born.
*[[February 22|22]] – [[Duane Swierczynski]] is born.
*[[February 26|26]] – [[Keith Ferguson]] is born.

==March==
*[[March 20|20]] – [[Jonathan Lipow]] is born.
*[[March 23|23]] – [[Reggie Watts]] is born.
*[[March 31|31]] – [[Andrew Bowen]] is born.

==April==
*[[April 3|03]] – [[Paul S. Kemp]] is born.
*[[April 5|05]] – [[Tom Hodges|Thomas Hodges]] is born.
*[[April 8|08]] – [[Sung Kang]] is born.
*[[April 14|14]] – [[Alan Ruscoe]] is born.
*[[April 26|26]] – [[Bronagh Gallagher]] is born.

==May==
*[[May 2|02]] – [[Dwayne Johnson]] is born.
*[[May 11|11]] – [[Athena Yvette Portillo]] is born.
*[[May 16|16]] – [[Khary Payton]] is born.
*[[May 19|19]] – [[Claudia Karvan]] is born.

==June==
*[[June 7|07]] – [[Karl Urban]] is born.
*[[June 26|26]] – [[Núria Peris]] is born.

==July==
*[[July 10|10]] – [[Simone Bianchi]] is born.
*10 – [[Peter Serafinowicz]] is born.
*[[July 18|18]] – [[Slim Khezri]] is born.
*18 – [[Luke Ross]] is born.
*[[July 21|21]] – [[Gary Whitta]] is born.
*[[July 26|26]] – [[Spencer Wilding]] is born.
*[[July 27|27]] – [[Maya Rudolph]] is born.

==August==
*[[August 3|03]] – [[Sumalee Montano]] is born.
*[[August 15|15]] – [[Matthew Wood]] is born.
*[[August 18|18]] – [[Cecep Arif Rahman]] is born.

==September==
*[[September 11|11]] – [[Jacen Burrows]] is born.
*[[September 12|12]] – [[Gideon Emery]] is born.
*[[September 14|14]] – [[Marc Silk]] is born.
*[[September 22|22]] – [[Matt Busch]] is born.
*[[September 24|24]] – [[Kate Fleetwood]] is born.
*[[September 27|27]] – [[Chris Avellone]] is born.

==October==
*[[October 2|02]] – [[Matt Bouchard]] is born.
*[[October 7|07]] – [[Sean Kenin Elias-Reyes]] is born.
*[[October 11|11]] – [[Claudia Black]] is born.

==November==
*[[November 6|06]] – [[Thandiwe Newton]] is born.
*[[November 7|07]] – [[Jason London]] is born.
*[[November 10|10]] – [[Trevor Devall]] is born.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – [[Matt Fraction]] is born.
*[[December 15|15]] – [[Lee Jung-jae]] is born.
*[[December 29|29]] – [[Jude Law]] is born.

==Unknown==
*[[Khan Bonfils]] is born.
*[[Francisco Ruiz Velasco]] is born.
*[[Roy Thomas]] succeeds [[Stan Lee]] as editor-in-chief of [[Marvel Comics]].

==Sources==
*''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle]]''
*[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle (updated edition)|''Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle'' (updated edition)]]
*''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, Updated and Expanded Edition]]''
*''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''
